title: ARROWMAX Mini Engraving Pen: Ultimate Cordless Portable Tool for Artists & DIYers - Engrave 50+ Surfaces - Beginner Friendly - Rechargeable - Free 30 Bits
features: Wireless Freedom, Endless Creativity-Our Engraving Pen break free from cords with a wireless design and USB-C fast charging, The cordless electric engraver pen allowing uninterrupted creativity anytime, anywhere.

Powerful Performance, Precision Carving-Engraver equipped with a 4-speed hollow cup motor (10000-30000 RPM) and 120g/cm torque, Mini electric engraving pen for all materials, effortlessly handle various materials for detailed carvings.
Ergonomic Design, Comfortable Use-The engraving tool weighing just 6.9oz with an ergonomic design, engraver pen ensures fatigue-free use during long creative sessions.

Versatile Accessories, Full Support- This electric engraving pen includes 30 high-quality carving bits, engraving pen for metal, wood, glass and plastic suitable for over 50 surfaces, meeting all your creative needs.

Perfect Gift, Unleash Creativity- cordless rotary tool ideal for both adults and kids, it’s the perfect gift for Christmas, birthdays, and special occasions, offering a memorable and personalized experience.this handheld engraving pen is your ultimate tool for creative exploration!
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Comparision of Product SGS Add To Basket SGS MAX Buying Options SDS ULTRA Add To Basket SGS MINI Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 29 4.3 out of 5 stars 221 4.1 out of 5 stars 344 4.3 out of 5 stars 72 Price £33.97 £ 33 . 97 £69.97 £ 69 . 97 £47.47 £ 47 . 47 £39.97 £ 39 . 97 Smart Motion Control ✔ ✔ ✘ ✘ APP-Customization ✘ ✔ ✘ ✔ Setting Modes 4 5 5 1 Bits 30 42 10 36 OLED Display ✔ ✔ ✔ ✘ Battery 500mAh 500mAh 500mAh 350mAh Does it come with cable? Can I charge it with a Type-C PD charger? The ARROWMAX mini engraving come with a cable. Our mini engraving pen doesn't charge on USB-C PD, it only supports USB-A to USB-C charging. How can I know if the electric engravinger is charging? When the engraving pen is charging, you can check the charging status through the LED display. Can I use a rotary tool cordless while charging? No, the engarving pen cannot be used while charging. You must fully charge it before use. What should I do if my mini engraving pen won't charge or stops working? Our rotary tool have a one-year sale service. If the drill fails to charge or stops working. You can request us for repair or replacement. Tip for Battery Maintenance Please fully charge it before first use to ensure the greatest user experience, and make sure this mini electric engraving pen is fully charged.
